ew_context: Price rejecting from key Fibonacci resistance in what appears to be wave B of larger corrective structure, setting up for wave C decline
pattern_desc: Strong rejection from 61.8% Fibonacci retracement with bearish EMA configuration (EMA20 < EMA50) and high momentum readings
key_levels: Resistance: 4798.46 (current Fib level), 5110.53 (key resistance). Support: 4100.80 (major swing low)
invalidation: Break above 5110.53 would negate the bearish structure
market_context: Gold facing headwinds despite geopolitical tensions as ceasefire talks progress. Dollar weakness from Iran negotiations may provide some support but technical structure favors decline
